glosses.ro: a se învecina cu; a înveli
glosses.ja: 接する; 布団をかける

sentences.target: Des platanes bordent la rue principale.

translations.fr: Des platanes bordent la rue principale.
translations.en: Plane trees line the main street.
translations.es: Plátanos de sombra bordean la calle principal.
translations.it: I platani fiancheggiano la strada principale.
translations.ko: 주요 도로를 따라 플라타너스가 늘어서 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 法国梧桐沿着主街成排而立。
translations.yue: 法國梧桐沿住主街兩旁排開。
translations.pt: Os plátanos ladeiam a rua principal.
translations.tr: Çınar ağaçları ana cadde boyunca sıralanıyor.
translations.vi: Cây tiêu huyền mọc dọc theo phố chính.
translations.ar: أشجار الدلب تصطف على طول الشارع الرئيسي.
translations.hi: चिनार के पेड़ मुख्य सड़क के किनारे कतार में लगे हैं.
translations.el: Πλατάνια παρατάσσονται κατά μήκος του κεντρικού δρόμου.
translations.id: Pohon platanus berjajar di sepanjang jalan utama.
translations.ja: プラタナスが目抜き通りに並んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite plural article marking the noun phrase; introduces 'platanes' as non-specific plural.
Common noun, plural; syntactic subject of 'bordent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes direct object 'la rue principale'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'rue'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'bordent'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'rue' and agrees in gender/number.

sentences.target: Je borde Emma avant d'éteindre la lumière.
sentences.reading: /ʒə bɔʁd ɛma avɑ̃ detɛ̃dʁ la lymjɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je borde Emma avant d'éteindre la lumière.
translations.ipa: /ʒə bɔʁd ɛma avɑ̃ detɛ̃dʁ la lymjɛʁ/
translations.en: I tuck Emma in before turning off the light.
translations.es: Arropo a Emma antes de apagar la luz.
translations.de: Ich decke Emma zu, bevor ich das Licht ausmache.
translations.it: Rimbocco le coperte a Emma prima di spegnere la luce.
translations.ko: 불을 끄기 전에 엠마를 이불로 덮어 준다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在关灯前给艾玛掖好被子。
translations.ru: Перед тем как выключить свет, я укрываю Эмму.
translations.pt: Eu aconchego a Emma antes de apagar a luz.
translations.he: אני מכסה את אמה לפני שאני מכבה את האור.
translations.tr: Işığı kapatmadan önce Emma’nın üstünü örtüyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đắp chăn cho Emma trước khi tắt đèn.
translations.ar: أغطّي إيما قبل أن أطفئ الضوء.
translations.nl: Ik stop Emma in voordat ik het licht uitdoe.
translations.uk: Я вкриваю Емму ковдрою перед тим, як вимкнути світло.
translations.hu: Mielőtt lekapcsolom a villanyt, betakargatom Emmát.
translations.hi: लाइट बंद करने से पहले मैं एम्मा को कंबल ओढ़ा देता हूँ.
translations.el: Σκεπάζω την Έμμα πριν κλείσω το φως.
translations.nb: Jeg pakker Emma under dyna før jeg slår av lyset.
translations.id: Aku menyelimuti Emma sebelum mematikan lampu.
translations.sv: Jag stoppar om Emma innan jag släcker lampan.
translations.ro: O învelesc pe Emma înainte să sting lumina.
translations.da: Jeg putter Emma, før jeg slukker lyset.
translations.fi: Peittelen Emman ennen kuin sammutan valon.
translations.ja: 明かりを消す前にエマに布団を掛ける。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Proper noun; direct object of 'borde'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement ('avant de + infinitif').
Infinitive verb introduced by elided preposition 'de' (avant de + infinitif); complements 'avant'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'lumière'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'éteindre'.

sentences.target: On va border la jupe ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va bɔʁde la ʒyp sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On va border la jupe ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va bɔʁde la ʒyp sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’re going to hem the skirt tonight.
translations.es: Vamos a hacer el dobladillo de la falda esta noche.
translations.de: Wir werden den Rock heute Abend säumen.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 치마 단을 꿰맬 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚要给这条裙子缝边。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚會幫條裙收邊。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы будем подшивать юбку.
translations.pt: Vamos fazer a barra da saia hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Bu akşam eteğin kenarını kıvırıp dikeceğiz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta sẽ lên lai cho chiếc váy.
translations.nl: Vanavond gaan we de rok zomen.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми будемо підшивати спідницю.
translations.hu: Ma este beszegjük a szoknya alját.
translations.hi: आज रात हम स्कर्ट का किनारा सिलेंगे.
translations.el: Απόψε θα κάνουμε στρίφωμα στη φούστα.
translations.nb: I kveld skal vi lege opp skjørtet.
translations.id: Malam ini kita akan menjahit keliman rok.
translations.sv: I kväll ska vi fålla kjolen.
translations.ro: În seara asta o să-i facem tiv fustei.
translations.da: I aften lægger vi op på nederdelen.
translations.ja: 今夜はスカートの裾をまつります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal/colloquial 'we', takes 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Auxiliary verb (futur proche), present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects infinitive 'border'.
Infinitive main verb; complement of auxiliary 'va'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'jupe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'border'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun; temporal complement indicating when the action occurs.

sentences.target: Vous bordez le parterre avec des pierres.
sentences.reading: /vu bɔʁde lə paʁtɛʁ avɛk de pjɛʁ/

translations.fr: Vous bordez le parterre avec des pierres.
translations.ipa: /vu bɔʁde lə paʁtɛʁ avɛk de pjɛʁ/
translations.en: You’re edging the flowerbed with stones.
translations.es: Estás delimitando el parterre con piedras.
translations.de: Ihr fasst das Beet mit Steinen ein.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们正在用石头给花坛砌边。
translations.yue: 你哋正用石頭為花壇砌邊。
translations.pt: Vocês estão delimitando o canteiro com pedras.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang viền bồn hoa bằng đá.
translations.nl: Jullie leggen een stenen rand om het bloemperk.
translations.hi: आप पत्थरों से फूलों की क्यारी की किनारी बना रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Dere legger stein langs kanten av blomsterbedet.
translations.id: Kalian membuat tepian petak bunga dengan batu.
translations.ro: Voi marginiți stratul de flori cu pietre.
translations.da: I laver en kant omkring blomsterbedet med sten.
translations.ja: 石で花壇の縁取りをしている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person plural (also polite singular).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'parterre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'bordez'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Indefinite plural article marking 'pierres' as non-specific plural.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.
